name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Process Address
notes: This Building Block triggers when a remote thread is created at a start address ending in "0B80". This behaviour is indicative of a thread being created by Cobalt Strike.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Process Address on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
when the event matches Start Address (custom) is not N/A
when the event matches Start Address (custom) matches any of expressions \S+0B80$
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Cobalt Strike Process Address on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
AND when the event matches Start Address (custom) is not N/A
AND when the event matches Start Address (custom) matches any of expressions \S+0B80$
